# Shippabel

> Shippabel helps non-technical people publish their AI-built apps to the Google Play Store. No coding and no computer needed.

## What is Shippabel?

Shippabel is a web platform (shippabel.com) that takes apps built with AI coding tools — like Cursor, Bolt, Lovable, Claude Code, ChatGPT, and Base44 — and publishes them to the Google Play Store. It handles the entire process: scanning for issues, auto-fixing problems, generating store listings with AI, creating screenshots, building the app in the cloud, and submitting to Google Play.

## Who is it for?

Non-technical "vibe coders" — people who had an idea for an app, used AI to build it, and now need help getting it published. They don't know what Android Studio is, they've never used a terminal, and they don't want to learn. Shippabel handles all the technical complexity for them.

## How it works

1. **Check your app** (30 seconds) — Paste your GitHub link. Shippabel scans your app against Google Play requirements and gives you a readiness score from 0-100.
2. **Fix problems** (1 click) — Most issues are auto-fixed: package names, version codes, missing icons, security issues.
3. **Write your store page** (2 minutes) — AI generates your app name, description, keywords, and privacy policy. Pick from 3 optimized variants.
4. **Create screenshots** (5 minutes) — Upload screenshots from your phone. Shippabel frames them in professional device mockups.
5. **Publish** (1 click + wait) — Shippabel builds your app in the cloud as a signed Android App Bundle (AAB) and submits it to Google Play. Google usually reviews new apps in a few hours to a few days.

## Pricing

- **Free**: Unlimited app scans, readiness reports, shareable results
- **Ship ($99 one-time)**: Auto-fix, AI store page, screenshots, build and submit to Google Play
- **Unlimited ($179 one-time)**: Everything in Ship for unlimited apps, priority support

No subscriptions. No monthly fees.

## Supported platforms and tools

Shippabel works with apps built using:
- Cursor, Bolt.new, Lovable, Claude Code, ChatGPT, Base44
- React, React Native, Expo, Next.js, Vue, static websites
- Automatically wraps web apps as a mobile app

## Key facts

- Total cost to publish: about $124 (Google Play developer account $25 one-time + Shippabel $99 one-time)
- Time from start to live: often the same day or the next (Google review takes a few hours to a few days)
- Hands-on time: approximately 30 minutes
- No coding, terminal commands, Android Studio, or computer required — Shippabel builds in the cloud
- Output is a signed Android App Bundle (AAB), the format Google Play requires
- Privacy policy generated and hosted automatically
- Note: Apple App Store / iOS publishing is NOT supported yet — Shippabel publishes to Google Play only for now

- Free scan: https://shippabel.com/scan
- Pricing: https://shippabel.com/pricing
